Title: B6. Binary Representation Minimization

Node started: Find the binary representation of 2023 and identify its Hamming weight. Determine if 2023 is coprime to 2. If it is, explain the implication for the existence of an n such that 2023*n is a power of 2.

Node started: Given that 2023 is an odd integer, determine the minimum possible number of ones in the binary representation of any multiple of 2023. Specifically, check if there exists an n such that 2023*n = 2^m for some integer m, and if not, determine the smallest possible number of ones (k) such that 2023 divides a sum of k powers of 2.
